title: Luffy Protects Nami
description: On pages 1–4, luffy protects nami as luffy refuses to fight the wildlife while carrying Nami, and the journey toward the doctor becomes a brutal climb through Drum’s snowfields.
scene: Luffy Protects Nami. Luffy refuses to fight the wildlife while carrying Nami, and the journey toward the doctor becomes a brutal climb through Drum’s snowfields. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: My apologies,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is my fault.

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: I had heard the doctor came down from the mountain yesterday,

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: So I assumed she wouldn't come down again for several days...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: But it seems I jumped too quickly to conclusions...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't worry, it's not your fault!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The problem now is those two abnormally strong crewmates of mine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even if we were to rush up the mountain, there's no way we could catch up to them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So if the doctor's in cocoa weed right now,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We have to hurry up and ask her to return back to the castle right away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes... that's all we can do right now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Forgive me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's my fault that this country doesn't even have enough doctors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What? That's not your fault, Dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: In any case, let's hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It jumped!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What in the world... How can it jump like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's like a gorilla!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No, it's a polar bear!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: No, it's goddamn rabbit!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: But didn't you just say it was a gorilla?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This must be the "Lapin" that Dalton was talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's so many of'em!

summary: This part centers on luffy protects nami, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
